items.caption: A collage of various items, likely intended as a gift guide for someone who enjoys dumpster diving or has a fondness for repurposing items found in trash. the items include a green "dumpster diving" sign, a "going green" magazine, a "td rat dumpster" mug, a "from trash to treasure" book, a "i love dumpsters" t-shirt, a "keep dumpsters diving" t-shirt, a "dumpster diving gloves" pair, a "dumpster diving" t-shirt, and a "dumpster diving" tote bag. the items are arranged in a grid pattern, with each item occupying its own space. the overall style of the image is promotional, with a focus on the theme of upcycling and finding value in discarded items.
